headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale, no acute risk) — Waaree Energies commissions 3 GW solar module plant, strengthening renewable capacity but limited immediate ESG impact
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, TCFD, CDP disclosure obligations; no penalties or deadlines breached.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue uplift possible over time.
No immediate impact on cost of capital; green financing potential in future.
